import cv2
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from pynq_dpu import DpuOverlay

# =====================================================
# USER CONFIG (change ONLY this)
# =====================================================
CASE_ID   = "10019"

IMG_ROOT  = "/home/xilinx/jupyter_notebooks/MRI/dataset/images"
MASK_ROOT = "/home/xilinx/jupyter_notebooks/MRI/dataset/mask"

BIT_FILE  = "dpu.bit"
XMODEL    = "UNet_zcu104.xmodel"

THRESH    = 0.5
# =====================================================


# =====================================================
# Load MRI images
# =====================================================
t2w = cv2.imread(f"{IMG_ROOT}/{CASE_ID}/{CASE_ID}_t2w.png", cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)
adc = cv2.imread(f"{IMG_ROOT}/{CASE_ID}/{CASE_ID}_adc.png", cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)
hbv = cv2.imread(f"{IMG_ROOT}/{CASE_ID}/{CASE_ID}_hbv.png", cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)

assert t2w is not None, "T2W not found"
assert adc is not None, "ADC not found"
assert hbv is not None, "HBV not found"

# Stack channels (order MUST match training)
img = np.stack([t2w, adc, hbv], axis=-1)   # H×W×3

# =====================================================
# Normalize
# =====================================================
img_norm = img.astype(np.float32) / 255.0

# =====================================================
# Load DPU
# =====================================================
overlay = DpuOverlay(BIT_FILE)
overlay.load_model(XMODEL)
dpu = overlay.runner

inp = dpu.get_input_tensors()[0]
out = dpu.get_output_tensors()[0]

in_fix  = inp.get_attr("fix_point")
out_fix = out.get_attr("fix_point")

# =====================================================
# Quantize input
# =====================================================
input_scale = 2 ** in_fix
img_q = np.round(img_norm * input_scale).astype(np.int8)
img_q = np.expand_dims(img_q, axis=0)  # (1,H,W,3)

# =====================================================
# Run DPU
# =====================================================
output_data = [np.empty(out.dims, dtype=np.int8)]
job_id = dpu.execute_async([img_q], output_data)
dpu.wait(job_id)

y_q = output_data[0]

# =====================================================
# Dequantize + Sigmoid
# =====================================================
output_scale = 2 ** out_fix
y = y_q.astype(np.float32) / output_scale
prob = 1 / (1 + np.exp(-y))

mask = (prob[0, :, :, 0] > THRESH).astype(np.uint8) * 255
cv2.imwrite("predicted_mask.png", mask)

# =====================================================
# Load Ground Truth
# =====================================================
gt_mask = cv2.imread(f"{MASK_ROOT}/{CASE_ID}.png", cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)
gt = (gt_mask > 127).astype(np.uint8)
pd = (mask > 127).astype(np.uint8)

# =====================================================
# Metrics (Dice, IoU, Precision, Recall, Accuracy)
# =====================================================
eps = 1e-7

gt_f = gt.reshape(-1).astype(np.float32)
pd_f = pd.reshape(-1).astype(np.float32)

TP = np.sum(pd_f * gt_f)
FP = np.sum(pd_f * (1 - gt_f))
FN = np.sum((1 - pd_f) * gt_f)
TN = np.sum((1 - pd_f) * (1 - gt_f))

dice = (2 * TP + eps) / (2 * TP + FP + FN + eps)
iou  = (TP + eps) / (TP + FP + FN + eps)
precision = (TP + eps) / (TP + FP + eps)
recall    = (TP + eps) / (TP + FN + eps)
accuracy  = (TP + TN + eps) / (TP + TN + FP + FN + eps)

print("\n========== SEGMENTATION METRICS ==========")
print(f"Dice      : {dice:.4f}")
print(f"IoU       : {iou:.4f}")
print(f"Precision : {precision:.4f}")
print(f"Recall    : {recall:.4f}")
print(f"Accuracy  : {accuracy:.4f}")
print("==========================================\n")

# =====================================================
# Overlay helper
# =====================================================
def overlay_both(img, gt, pd):
    ov = cv2.cvtColor(img, cv2.COLOR_GRAY2RGB)
    ov[(gt==1) & (pd==0)] = [255, 0, 0]    # GT only → Red
    ov[(pd==1) & (gt==0)] = [0, 0, 255]    # Pred only → Blue
    ov[(gt==1) & (pd==1)] = [128, 0, 128]  # Overlap → Purple
    return ov

# =====================================================
# Visualization (4 × 3)
# =====================================================
plt.figure(figsize=(14, 12))

# Row 1: Original MRI
plt.subplot(4,3,1); plt.title("T2W"); plt.imshow(t2w, cmap="gray"); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(4,3,2); plt.title("ADC"); plt.imshow(adc, cmap="gray"); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(4,3,3); plt.title("HBV"); plt.imshow(hbv, cmap="gray"); plt.axis("off")

# Row 2: Probability map
plt.subplot(4,3,4); plt.title("Probability Map"); plt.imshow(prob[0,:,:,0], cmap="inferno"); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(4,3,5); plt.imshow(prob[0,:,:,0], cmap="inferno"); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(4,3,6); plt.imshow(prob[0,:,:,0], cmap="inferno"); plt.axis("off")

# Row 3: Predicted mask
plt.subplot(4,3,7); plt.title("Predicted Mask"); plt.imshow(mask, cmap="gray"); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(4,3,8); plt.imshow(mask, cmap="gray"); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(4,3,9); plt.imshow(mask, cmap="gray"); plt.axis("off")

# Row 4: Overlay
plt.subplot(4,3,10); plt.title("Overlay T2W"); plt.imshow(overlay_both(t2w, gt, pd)); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(4,3,11); plt.title("Overlay ADC"); plt.imshow(overlay_both(adc, gt, pd)); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(4,3,12); plt.title("Overlay HBV"); plt.imshow(overlay_both(hbv, gt, pd)); plt.axis("off")

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

print("✅ Inference complete")
print("📁 Saved → predicted_mask.png")

========== SEGMENTATION METRICS ==========
Dice      : 0.9268
IoU       : 0.8635
Precision : 0.8770
Recall    : 0.9824
Accuracy  : 0.9938
==========================================

📁 Saved → predicted_mask.png

for t in [0.15, 0.25, 0.35, 0.45, 0.55]:
    pd = (prob[0,:,:,0] > t).astype(np.uint8)
    d, i, p, r, a = metrics(gt, pd)
    print(f"TH={t:.2f} | Dice={d:.3f} | Prec={p:.3f} | Rec={r:.3f}")

TH=0.15 | Dice=0.487 | Prec=0.377 | Rec=0.688
TH=0.25 | Dice=0.444 | Prec=0.362 | Rec=0.575
TH=0.35 | Dice=0.453 | Prec=0.374 | Rec=0.575
TH=0.45 | Dice=0.459 | Prec=0.388 | Rec=0.563
TH=0.55 | Dice=0.449 | Prec=0.393 | Rec=0.525
In [8]:
import cv2
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from pynq_dpu import DpuOverlay
import time

# =====================================================
# USER CONFIG (MATCH TRAINING)
# =====================================================
CASE_ID = "10019"

BIT_FILE = "dpu.bit"
LESION_XMODEL = "lesion_unet (1).xmodel"

PATCH_SIZE = 144
THRESH = 0.55        # tuned for INT8
EPS = 1e-6
# =====================================================

print("\n==============================")
print("🧠 Lesion UNet – DPU Inference")
print("==============================\n")

# =====================================================
# Load images (same directory)
# =====================================================
t2w  = cv2.imread(f"{CASE_ID}_t2w.png", cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)
hbv  = cv2.imread(f"{CASE_ID}_hbv.png", cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)
adc  = cv2.imread(f"{CASE_ID}_adc.png", cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)
mask = cv2.imread(f"{CASE_ID}.png",     cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)

assert t2w is not None
assert hbv is not None
assert adc is not None
assert mask is not None

print("✔ Images loaded")

# =====================================================
# 🔴 EXACT TRAINING NORMALIZATION (per modality)
# load_img() equivalent
# =====================================================
def zscore(img):
    img = img.astype(np.float32)
    return (img - img.mean()) / (img.std() + 1e-5)

t2w = zscore(t2w)
hbv = zscore(hbv)
adc = zscore(adc)

mask = (mask > 0).astype(np.uint8)

# =====================================================
# Stack EXACTLY like training (CHW)
# =====================================================
img  = np.stack([t2w, hbv, adc], axis=0)     # (3,H,W)
mask = mask[None].astype(np.float32)         # (1,H,W)

print("✔ Normalized + stacked (CHW)")
print("  img :", img.shape)
print("  mask:", mask.shape)

# =====================================================
# EXACT crop_patch() from training
# =====================================================
_, H, W = img.shape
mask2d = mask[0]

ys, xs = np.where(mask2d > 0)
if len(xs) == 0:
    y, x = H // 2, W // 2
else:
    y, x = int(ys.mean()), int(xs.mean())

s = PATCH_SIZE // 2
y1, y2 = y - s, y + s
x1, x2 = x - s, x + s

pad_t = max(0, -y1)
pad_l = max(0, -x1)
pad_b = max(0, y2 - H)
pad_r = max(0, x2 - W)

img  = np.pad(img,  ((0,0),(pad_t,pad_b),(pad_l,pad_r)))
mask = np.pad(mask, ((0,0),(pad_t,pad_b),(pad_l,pad_r)))

y1 += pad_t; y2 += pad_t
x1 += pad_l; x2 += pad_l

img_c  = img[:, y1:y2, x1:x2]
mask_c = mask[:, y1:y2, x1:x2]

print("✔ Cropped")
print("  img_c :", img_c.shape)
print("  mask_c:", mask_c.shape)

# =====================================================
# CHW → HWC (MATCH TRAINING OUTPUT)
# =====================================================
img_c  = np.transpose(img_c,  (1,2,0))   # (144,144,3)
mask_c = np.transpose(mask_c, (1,2,0))   # (144,144,1)

img_c = np.expand_dims(img_c, axis=0)    # (1,144,144,3)

print("✔ Transposed to HWC")
print("  final input:", img_c.shape)

# =====================================================
# Load DPU
# =====================================================
overlay = DpuOverlay(BIT_FILE)
overlay.load_model(LESION_XMODEL)
dpu = overlay.runner

inp = dpu.get_input_tensors()[0]
out = dpu.get_output_tensors()[0]

print("✔ DPU loaded")
print("  Input :", inp.dims, "fixp:", inp.get_attr("fix_point"))
print("  Output:", out.dims, "fixp:", out.get_attr("fix_point"))

# =====================================================
# Quantize input
# =====================================================
img_q = np.round(
    img_c * (2 ** inp.get_attr("fix_point"))
).astype(np.int8)

out_buf = [np.empty(out.dims, dtype=np.int8)]

# =====================================================
# Run DPU
# =====================================================
t0 = time.time()
jid = dpu.execute_async([img_q], out_buf)
dpu.wait(jid)
t1 = time.time()

print(f"✔ DPU inference time: {(t1-t0)*1000:.2f} ms")

# =====================================================
# Dequantize + sigmoid
# =====================================================
logits = out_buf[0].astype(np.float32) / (2 ** out.get_attr("fix_point"))
prob   = 1 / (1 + np.exp(-logits))
pred   = (prob[0,:,:,0] > THRESH).astype(np.uint8)

gt = mask_c[:,:,0].astype(np.uint8)

# =====================================================
# Metrics (same as TF eval)
# =====================================================
def metrics(gt, pd):
    TP = np.sum(gt * pd)
    FP = np.sum((1-gt) * pd)
    FN = np.sum(gt * (1-pd))
    TN = np.sum((1-gt) * (1-pd))

    dice = (2*TP + EPS) / (2*TP + FP + FN + EPS)
    iou  = (TP + EPS) / (TP + FP + FN + EPS)
    prec = (TP + EPS) / (TP + FP + EPS)
    rec  = (TP + EPS) / (TP + FN + EPS)
    acc  = (TP + TN + EPS) / (TP + TN + FP + FN + EPS)

    return dice, iou, prec, rec, acc

dice, iou, prec, rec, acc = metrics(gt, pred)

print("\n========== LESION METRICS ==========")
print("Dice      :", dice)
print("IoU       :", iou)
print("Precision :", prec)
print("Recall    :", rec)
print("Accuracy  :", acc)
print("===================================")

# =====================================================
# Visualization (training-aligned)
# =====================================================
fig, ax = plt.subplots(1, 4, figsize=(22,5))

ax[0].imshow(t2w, cmap="gray")
ax[0].imshow(mask.squeeze(), cmap="Reds", alpha=0.4)
ax[0].set_title("Original T2W + GT")
ax[0].axis("off")

ax[1].imshow(img_c[0,:,:,0], cmap="gray")
ax[1].imshow(gt, cmap="Reds", alpha=0.4)
ax[1].set_title("Cropped T2W + GT")
ax[1].axis("off")

ax[2].imshow(img_c[0,:,:,0], cmap="gray")
ax[2].imshow(pred, cmap="Blues", alpha=0.4)
ax[2].set_title("Cropped T2W + DPU Prediction")
ax[2].axis("off")

im = ax[3].imshow(prob[0,:,:,0], cmap="jet")
ax[3].set_title("Probability Map")
ax[3].axis("off")
plt.colorbar(im, ax=ax[3], fraction=0.046)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

==============================
🧠 Lesion UNet – DPU Inference
==============================

✔ Images loaded
✔ Normalized + stacked (CHW)
  img : (3, 256, 256)
  mask: (1, 256, 256)
✔ Cropped
  img_c : (3, 144, 144)
  mask_c: (1, 144, 144)
✔ Transposed to HWC
  final input: (1, 144, 144, 3)
✔ DPU loaded
  Input : [1, 144, 144, 3] fixp: 5
  Output: [1, 144, 144, 1] fixp: 3
✔ DPU inference time: 11.05 ms

========== LESION METRICS ==========
Dice      : 0.4491978639080328
IoU       : 0.2896551773127229
Precision : 0.392523370163333
Recall    : 0.5250000059375
Accuracy  : 0.9950327932101161
===================================

import cv2
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from pynq_dpu import DpuOverlay

# =====================================================
# USER CONFIG
# =====================================================
CASE_ID = "10008"
MASK_ROOT = "/home/xilinx/jupyter_notebooks/MRI/dataset/mask"

BIT_FILE        = "dpu.bit"
PG_XMODEL       = "UNet_zcu104.xmodel"
LESION_XMODEL   = "lesion_unet (1).xmodel"

PATCH_SIZE = 144
PG_THRESH  = 0.5
LS_THRESH  = 0.1
EPS = 1e-6
# =====================================================


# =====================================================
# Helper functions
# =====================================================
def zscore(img):
    img = img.astype(np.float32)
    return (img - img.mean()) / (img.std() + 1e-5)

def overlay(img, mask, color):
    rgb = cv2.cvtColor(img.astype(np.uint8), cv2.COLOR_GRAY2RGB)
    rgb[mask == 1] = color
    return rgb.astype(np.uint8)

def metrics(gt, pd):
    TP = np.sum(gt * pd)
    FP = np.sum((1-gt) * pd)
    FN = np.sum(gt * (1-pd))
    TN = np.sum((1-gt) * (1-pd))

    dice = (2*TP + EPS) / (2*TP + FP + FN + EPS)
    iou  = (TP + EPS) / (TP + FP + FN + EPS)
    prec = (TP + EPS) / (TP + FP + EPS)
    rec  = (TP + EPS) / (TP + FN + EPS)
    acc  = (TP + TN + EPS) / (TP + TN + FP + FN + EPS)

    return dice, iou, prec, rec, acc


# =====================================================
# Load images + GT masks
# =====================================================
print("\n==============================")
print("📥 Loading images and GT masks")
print("==============================")

t2w  = cv2.imread(f"{CASE_ID}_t2w.png", cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)
hbv  = cv2.imread(f"{CASE_ID}_hbv.png", cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)
adc  = cv2.imread(f"{CASE_ID}_adc.png", cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)

pg_gt_full     = cv2.imread(f"{MASK_ROOT}/{CASE_ID}.png", cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)
lesion_gt_full = cv2.imread(f"{CASE_ID}.png", cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)

assert t2w is not None and hbv is not None and adc is not None
assert pg_gt_full is not None and lesion_gt_full is not None

pg_gt_full     = (pg_gt_full > 0).astype(np.uint8)
lesion_gt_full = (lesion_gt_full > 0).astype(np.uint8)

print("✔ Images & GT loaded successfully")


# =====================================================
# ================= STAGE 1: PROSTATE =================
# =====================================================
print("\n==============================")
print("🟦 Prostate Gland Segmentation")
print("==============================")

img_pg = np.stack([t2w, adc, hbv], axis=-1).astype(np.float32) / 255.0
img_pg = np.expand_dims(img_pg, axis=0)

overlay_hw = DpuOverlay(BIT_FILE)
overlay_hw.load_model(PG_XMODEL)
print(f"✔ Prostate XMODEL loaded → {PG_XMODEL}")

dpu_pg = overlay_hw.runner
inp_pg = dpu_pg.get_input_tensors()[0]
out_pg = dpu_pg.get_output_tensors()[0]

img_pg_q = np.round(
    img_pg * (2 ** inp_pg.get_attr("fix_point"))
).astype(np.int8)

out_pg_buf = [np.empty(out_pg.dims, dtype=np.int8)]
jid = dpu_pg.execute_async([img_pg_q], out_pg_buf)
dpu_pg.wait(jid)

pg_logits = out_pg_buf[0].astype(np.float32) / (2 ** out_pg.get_attr("fix_point"))
pg_logits = np.clip(pg_logits, -20, 20)
pg_prob   = 1 / (1 + np.exp(-pg_logits))
pg_pred   = (pg_prob[0,:,:,0] > PG_THRESH).astype(np.uint8)

pg_dice, pg_iou, pg_prec, pg_rec, pg_acc = metrics(pg_gt_full, pg_pred)

print("\n📊 Prostate Segmentation Metrics")
print(f"Dice      : {pg_dice:.4f}")
print(f"IoU       : {pg_iou:.4f}")
print(f"Precision : {pg_prec:.4f}")
print(f"Recall    : {pg_rec:.4f}")
print(f"Accuracy  : {pg_acc:.4f}")
print("✔ Prostate inference done")


# =====================================================
# ================ STAGE 2: LESION ====================
# =====================================================
print("\n==============================")
print("🟥 Lesion Segmentation")
print("==============================")

# keep originals for visualization
t2w_vis, hbv_vis, adc_vis = t2w.copy(), hbv.copy(), adc.copy()

# training-exact normalization
t2w_n = zscore(t2w)
hbv_n = zscore(hbv)
adc_n = zscore(adc)

img_ls  = np.stack([t2w_n, hbv_n, adc_n], axis=0)
mask_ls = lesion_gt_full[None].astype(np.float32)

_, H, W = img_ls.shape
ys, xs = np.where(mask_ls[0] > 0)
cy, cx = (H//2, W//2) if len(xs) == 0 else (int(ys.mean()), int(xs.mean()))

s = PATCH_SIZE // 2
y1, y2 = cy - s, cy + s
x1, x2 = cx - s, cx + s

pad_t = max(0, -y1); pad_b = max(0, y2 - H)
pad_l = max(0, -x1); pad_r = max(0, x2 - W)

img_ls  = np.pad(img_ls,  ((0,0),(pad_t,pad_b),(pad_l,pad_r)))
mask_ls = np.pad(mask_ls, ((0,0),(pad_t,pad_b),(pad_l,pad_r)))

y1 += pad_t; y2 += pad_t
x1 += pad_l; x2 += pad_l

print(f"✔ Lesion ROI Extraction")

img_c = img_ls[:, y1:y2, x1:x2]
img_c = np.transpose(img_c, (1,2,0))
img_c = np.expand_dims(img_c, axis=0)

t2w_c_vis = t2w_vis[y1:y2, x1:x2]
hbv_c_vis = hbv_vis[y1:y2, x1:x2]
adc_c_vis = adc_vis[y1:y2, x1:x2]
gt_c      = mask_ls[0, y1:y2, x1:x2].astype(np.uint8)

overlay_hw.load_model(LESION_XMODEL)
print(f"✔ Lesion XMODEL loaded → {LESION_XMODEL}")

dpu_ls = overlay_hw.runner
inp_ls = dpu_ls.get_input_tensors()[0]
out_ls = dpu_ls.get_output_tensors()[0]

img_ls_q = np.round(
    img_c * (2 ** inp_ls.get_attr("fix_point"))
).astype(np.int8)

out_ls_buf = [np.empty(out_ls.dims, dtype=np.int8)]
jid = dpu_ls.execute_async([img_ls_q], out_ls_buf)
dpu_ls.wait(jid)

ls_logits = out_ls_buf[0].astype(np.float32) / (2 ** out_ls.get_attr("fix_point"))
ls_logits = np.clip(ls_logits, -20, 20)
ls_prob   = 1 / (1 + np.exp(-ls_logits))
ls_pred   = (ls_prob[0,:,:,0] > LS_THRESH).astype(np.uint8)

ls_dice, ls_iou, ls_prec, ls_rec, ls_acc = metrics(gt_c, ls_pred)

print("\n📊 Lesion Segmentation Metrics")
print(f"Dice      : {ls_dice:.4f}")
print(f"IoU       : {ls_iou:.4f}")
print(f"Precision : {ls_prec:.4f}")
print(f"Recall    : {ls_rec:.4f}")
print(f"Accuracy  : {ls_acc:.4f}")
print("✔ Lesion inference done")


# =====================================================
# ================= VISUALIZATION =====================
# =====================================================
print("\n==============================")
print("🖼️ Visualization")
print("==============================")

plt.figure(figsize=(18, 22))


# 1️⃣ Original MRI + GT Prostate
plt.subplot(6,3,1); plt.title("T2W + GT Prostate"); plt.imshow(overlay(t2w, pg_gt_full,[255,0,0])); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,2); plt.title("HBV + GT Prostate"); plt.imshow(overlay(hbv, pg_gt_full,[255,0,0])); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,3); plt.title("ADC + GT Prostate"); plt.imshow(overlay(adc, pg_gt_full,[255,0,0])); plt.axis("off")

# 2️⃣ Original MRI + GT Lesion
plt.subplot(6,3,4); plt.title("T2W + GT Lesion"); plt.imshow(overlay(t2w, lesion_gt_full,[255,0,0])); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,5); plt.title("HBV + GT Lesion"); plt.imshow(overlay(hbv, lesion_gt_full,[255,0,0])); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,6); plt.title("ADC + GT Lesion"); plt.imshow(overlay(adc, lesion_gt_full,[255,0,0])); plt.axis("off")

# 3️⃣ Original MRI + Pred Prostate
plt.subplot(6,3,7); plt.title("T2W + Pred Prostate"); plt.imshow(overlay(t2w, pg_pred,[0,0,255])); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,8); plt.title("HBV + Pred Prostate"); plt.imshow(overlay(hbv, pg_pred,[0,0,255])); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,9); plt.title("ADC + Pred Prostate"); plt.imshow(overlay(adc, pg_pred,[0,0,255])); plt.axis("off")

# 4️⃣ Cropped MRI (CLEAR)
plt.subplot(6,3,10); plt.title("Cropped T2W"); plt.imshow(t2w_c_vis, cmap="gray"); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,11); plt.title("Cropped HBV"); plt.imshow(hbv_c_vis, cmap="gray"); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,12); plt.title("Cropped ADC"); plt.imshow(adc_c_vis, cmap="gray"); plt.axis("off")

# 5️⃣ Cropped MRI + GT Lesion
plt.subplot(6,3,13); plt.title("Cropped T2W + GT"); plt.imshow(overlay(t2w_c_vis, gt_c,[255,0,0])); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,14); plt.title("Cropped HBV + GT"); plt.imshow(overlay(hbv_c_vis, gt_c,[255,0,0])); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,15); plt.title("Cropped ADC + GT"); plt.imshow(overlay(adc_c_vis, gt_c,[255,0,0])); plt.axis("off")

# 6️⃣ Cropped MRI + Pred Lesion
plt.subplot(6,3,16); plt.title("Cropped T2W + Pred"); plt.imshow(overlay(t2w_c_vis, ls_pred,[0,0,255])); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,17); plt.title("Cropped HBV + Pred"); plt.imshow(overlay(hbv_c_vis, ls_pred,[0,0,255])); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,18); plt.title("Cropped ADC + Pred"); plt.imshow(overlay(adc_c_vis, ls_pred,[0,0,255])); plt.axis("off")

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()


print("✅ COMPLETE TWO-STAGE INFERENCE FINISHED")

In [15]:
import cv2
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from pynq_dpu import DpuOverlay
import time

# =====================================================
# USER CONFIG
# =====================================================
CASE_ID = "10019"
MASK_ROOT = "/home/xilinx/jupyter_notebooks/MRI/dataset/mask"

BIT_FILE        = "dpu.bit"
PG_XMODEL       = "UNet_zcu104.xmodel"
LESION_XMODEL   = "lesion_unet (1).xmodel"

PATCH_SIZE = 144
PG_THRESH  = 0.5
LS_THRESH  = 0.55
EPS = 1e-6
# =====================================================


# =====================================================
# Helper functions
# =====================================================
def zscore(img):
    img = img.astype(np.float32)
    return (img - img.mean()) / (img.std() + 1e-5)

def overlay(img, mask, color):
    rgb = cv2.cvtColor(img.astype(np.uint8), cv2.COLOR_GRAY2RGB)
    rgb[mask == 1] = color
    return rgb.astype(np.uint8)

def metrics(gt, pd):
    TP = np.sum(gt * pd)
    FP = np.sum((1-gt) * pd)
    FN = np.sum(gt * (1-pd))
    TN = np.sum((1-gt) * (1-pd))

    dice = (2*TP + EPS) / (2*TP + FP + FN + EPS)
    iou  = (TP + EPS) / (TP + FP + FN + EPS)
    prec = (TP + EPS) / (TP + FP + EPS)
    rec  = (TP + EPS) / (TP + FN + EPS)
    acc  = (TP + TN + EPS) / (TP + TN + FP + FN + EPS)

    return dice, iou, prec, rec, acc


# =====================================================
# Load images + GT masks
# =====================================================
print("\n==============================")
print("📥 Loading images and GT masks")
print("==============================")

# >>> TIMING <<<
t_total_start = time.time()
# >>> TIMING <<<

t2w  = cv2.imread(f"{CASE_ID}_t2w.png", cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)
hbv  = cv2.imread(f"{CASE_ID}_hbv.png", cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)
adc  = cv2.imread(f"{CASE_ID}_adc.png", cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)

pg_gt_full     = cv2.imread(f"{MASK_ROOT}/{CASE_ID}.png", cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)
lesion_gt_full = cv2.imread(f"{CASE_ID}.png", cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)

assert t2w is not None and hbv is not None and adc is not None
assert pg_gt_full is not None and lesion_gt_full is not None

pg_gt_full     = (pg_gt_full > 0).astype(np.uint8)
lesion_gt_full = (lesion_gt_full > 0).astype(np.uint8)

print("✔ Images & GT loaded successfully")


# =====================================================
# ================= STAGE 1: PROSTATE =================
# =====================================================
print("\n==============================")
print("🟦 Prostate Gland Segmentation")
print("==============================")

img_pg = np.stack([t2w, adc, hbv], axis=-1).astype(np.float32) / 255.0
img_pg = np.expand_dims(img_pg, axis=0)

# 🔹 SEPARATE OVERLAY FOR PROSTATE
overlay_pg = DpuOverlay(BIT_FILE)
overlay_pg.load_model(PG_XMODEL)
print(f"✔ Prostate XMODEL loaded → {PG_XMODEL}")

dpu_pg = overlay_pg.runner
inp_pg = dpu_pg.get_input_tensors()[0]
out_pg = dpu_pg.get_output_tensors()[0]

img_pg_q = np.round(
    img_pg * (2 ** inp_pg.get_attr("fix_point"))
).astype(np.int8)

out_pg_buf = [np.empty(out_pg.dims, dtype=np.int8)]

# >>> TIMING <<<
t_pg_start = time.time()
jid = dpu_pg.execute_async([img_pg_q], out_pg_buf)
dpu_pg.wait(jid)
t_pg_end = time.time()

pg_inference_time = (t_pg_end - t_pg_start) * 1000.0   # ms
# >>> TIMING <<<


pg_logits = out_pg_buf[0].astype(np.float32) / (2 ** out_pg.get_attr("fix_point"))
pg_logits = np.clip(pg_logits, -20, 20)
pg_prob   = 1 / (1 + np.exp(-pg_logits))
pg_pred   = (pg_prob[0,:,:,0] > PG_THRESH).astype(np.uint8)

pg_dice, pg_iou, pg_prec, pg_rec, pg_acc = metrics(pg_gt_full, pg_pred)

print("\n📊 Prostate Segmentation Metrics")
print(f"Dice      : {pg_dice:.4f}")
print(f"IoU       : {pg_iou:.4f}")
print(f"Precision : {pg_prec:.4f}")
print(f"Recall    : {pg_rec:.4f}")
print(f"Accuracy  : {pg_acc:.4f}")
print("✔ Prostate inference done")


# =====================================================
# ================ STAGE 2: LESION ====================
# =====================================================
print("\n==============================")
print("🟥 Lesion Segmentation")
print("==============================")

# keep originals for visualization
t2w_vis, hbv_vis, adc_vis = t2w.copy(), hbv.copy(), adc.copy()

# training-exact normalization
t2w_n = zscore(t2w)
hbv_n = zscore(hbv)
adc_n = zscore(adc)

img_ls  = np.stack([t2w_n, hbv_n, adc_n], axis=0)
mask_ls = lesion_gt_full[None].astype(np.float32)

_, H, W = img_ls.shape
ys, xs = np.where(mask_ls[0] > 0)
cy, cx = (H//2, W//2) if len(xs) == 0 else (int(ys.mean()), int(xs.mean()))

s = PATCH_SIZE // 2
y1, y2 = cy - s, cy + s
x1, x2 = cx - s, cx + s

pad_t = max(0, -y1); pad_b = max(0, y2 - H)
pad_l = max(0, -x1); pad_r = max(0, x2 - W)

img_ls  = np.pad(img_ls,  ((0,0),(pad_t,pad_b),(pad_l,pad_r)))
mask_ls = np.pad(mask_ls, ((0,0),(pad_t,pad_b),(pad_l,pad_r)))

y1 += pad_t; y2 += pad_t
x1 += pad_l; x2 += pad_l

print("✔ Lesion ROI Extraction")

img_c = img_ls[:, y1:y2, x1:x2]
img_c = np.transpose(img_c, (1,2,0))
img_c = np.expand_dims(img_c, axis=0)

t2w_c_vis = t2w_vis[y1:y2, x1:x2]
hbv_c_vis = hbv_vis[y1:y2, x1:x2]
adc_c_vis = adc_vis[y1:y2, x1:x2]
gt_c      = mask_ls[0, y1:y2, x1:x2].astype(np.uint8)

# 🔹 SEPARATE OVERLAY FOR LESION
overlay_ls = DpuOverlay(BIT_FILE)
overlay_ls.load_model(LESION_XMODEL)
print(f"✔ Lesion XMODEL loaded → {LESION_XMODEL}")

dpu_ls = overlay_ls.runner
inp_ls = dpu_ls.get_input_tensors()[0]
out_ls = dpu_ls.get_output_tensors()[0]

img_ls_q = np.round(
    img_c * (2 ** inp_ls.get_attr("fix_point"))
).astype(np.int8)

out_ls_buf = [np.empty(out_ls.dims, dtype=np.int8)]

# >>> TIMING <<<
t_ls_start = time.time()
jid = dpu_ls.execute_async([img_ls_q], out_ls_buf)
dpu_ls.wait(jid)
t_ls_end = time.time()

ls_inference_time = (t_ls_end - t_ls_start) * 1000.0   # ms
# >>> TIMING <<<


ls_logits = out_ls_buf[0].astype(np.float32) / (2 ** out_ls.get_attr("fix_point"))
ls_logits = np.clip(ls_logits, -20, 20)
ls_prob   = 1 / (1 + np.exp(-ls_logits))
ls_pred   = (ls_prob[0,:,:,0] > LS_THRESH).astype(np.uint8)

ls_dice, ls_iou, ls_prec, ls_rec, ls_acc = metrics(gt_c, ls_pred)

print("\n📊 Lesion Segmentation Metrics")
print(f"Dice      : {ls_dice:.4f}")
print(f"IoU       : {ls_iou:.4f}")
print(f"Precision : {ls_prec:.4f}")
print(f"Recall    : {ls_rec:.4f}")
print(f"Accuracy  : {ls_acc:.4f}")
print("✔ Lesion inference done")


# =====================================================
# ================= VISUALIZATION =====================
# =====================================================
print("\n==============================")
print("🖼️ Visualization")
print("==============================")

plt.figure(figsize=(18, 22))

plt.subplot(6,3,1); plt.title("T2W + GT Prostate"); plt.imshow(overlay(t2w, pg_gt_full,[255,0,0])); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,2); plt.title("HBV + GT Prostate"); plt.imshow(overlay(hbv, pg_gt_full,[255,0,0])); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,3); plt.title("ADC + GT Prostate"); plt.imshow(overlay(adc, pg_gt_full,[255,0,0])); plt.axis("off")

plt.subplot(6,3,4); plt.title("T2W + GT Lesion"); plt.imshow(overlay(t2w, lesion_gt_full,[255,0,0])); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,5); plt.title("HBV + GT Lesion"); plt.imshow(overlay(hbv, lesion_gt_full,[255,0,0])); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,6); plt.title("ADC + GT Lesion"); plt.imshow(overlay(adc, lesion_gt_full,[255,0,0])); plt.axis("off")

plt.subplot(6,3,7); plt.title("T2W + Pred Prostate"); plt.imshow(overlay(t2w, pg_pred,[0,0,255])); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,8); plt.title("HBV + Pred Prostate"); plt.imshow(overlay(hbv, pg_pred,[0,0,255])); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,9); plt.title("ADC + Pred Prostate"); plt.imshow(overlay(adc, pg_pred,[0,0,255])); plt.axis("off")

plt.subplot(6,3,10); plt.title("Cropped T2W"); plt.imshow(t2w_c_vis, cmap="gray"); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,11); plt.title("Cropped HBV"); plt.imshow(hbv_c_vis, cmap="gray"); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,12); plt.title("Cropped ADC"); plt.imshow(adc_c_vis, cmap="gray"); plt.axis("off")

plt.subplot(6,3,13); plt.title("Cropped T2W + GT"); plt.imshow(overlay(t2w_c_vis, gt_c,[255,0,0])); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,14); plt.title("Cropped HBV + GT"); plt.imshow(overlay(hbv_c_vis, gt_c,[255,0,0])); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,15); plt.title("Cropped ADC + GT"); plt.imshow(overlay(adc_c_vis, gt_c,[255,0,0])); plt.axis("off")

plt.subplot(6,3,16); plt.title("Cropped T2W + Pred"); plt.imshow(overlay(t2w_c_vis, ls_pred,[0,0,255])); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,17); plt.title("Cropped HBV + Pred"); plt.imshow(overlay(hbv_c_vis, ls_pred,[0,0,255])); plt.axis("off")
plt.subplot(6,3,18); plt.title("Cropped ADC + Pred"); plt.imshow(overlay(adc_c_vis, ls_pred,[0,0,255])); plt.axis("off")

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

# >>> TIMING <<<
t_total_end = time.time()

total_latency = (t_total_end - t_total_start) * 1000.0   # ms
# >>> TIMING <<<

# =====================================================
# Timing summary
# =====================================================

total_dpu_time = pg_inference_time + ls_inference_time   # ms

fps = 1000.0 / total_dpu_time
throughput = fps     # frames per second (same meaning here)

print("\n==============================")
print("⏱️  PERFORMANCE SUMMARY")
print("==============================")
print(f"Prostate DPU inference time : {pg_inference_time:.2f} ms")
print(f"Lesion   DPU inference time : {ls_inference_time:.2f} ms")
print(f"Total DPU inference time    : {total_dpu_time:.2f} ms")
print(f"End-to-end latency          : {total_latency:.2f} ms")
print(f"Throughput                  : {throughput:.2f} samples/sec")
print(f"FPS                         : {fps:.2f}")
print("==============================")

print("✅ COMPLETE TWO-STAGE INFERENCE FINISHED")
